description: Curated evolution-method display overrides. These prefer game-agnostic or modern/common methods over location-specific/older game-specific methods when a broadly usable method exists, while keeping historical methods as notes.

eevee->leafeon.note: Modern/common method: use a Leaf Stone. Older games may require leveling up near a Moss Rock.
eevee->leafeon.reason: Prefer the item method over older Moss Rock location methods.

eevee->glaceon.note: Modern/common method: use an Ice Stone. Older games may require leveling up near an Ice Rock.
eevee->glaceon.reason: Prefer the item method over older Ice Rock location methods.

magneton->magnezone.note: Modern/common method: use a Thunder Stone. Older games may require leveling up in a special magnetic field.
magneton->magnezone.reason: Avoid showing a specific magnetic-field location as the primary method.

nosepass->probopass.note: Modern/common method: use a Thunder Stone. Older games may require leveling up in a special magnetic field.
nosepass->probopass.reason: Avoid showing a specific magnetic-field location as the primary method.

charjabug->vikavolt.note: Modern/common method: use a Thunder Stone. Older games may require leveling up in a special magnetic field.
charjabug->vikavolt.reason: Prefer the item method and fill in a missing/older method.

crabrawler->crabominable.note: Modern/common method: use an Ice Stone. Older games may require leveling up at Mount Lanakila.
crabrawler->crabominable.reason: Avoid showing the Alola-specific Mount Lanakila method as the primary method.

sandshrew-alola->sandslash-alola.reason: Correct display to the item method; do not show an unnecessary level requirement.

slowpoke-galar->slowbro-galar.reason: Correct display to the Galarica Cuff item method; do not show an unnecessary level requirement.

voltorb-hisui->electrode-hisui.reason: Correct display to the Leaf Stone item method; do not show an unnecessary level requirement.

bisharp->kingambit.note: Level up after defeating three Bisharp that hold a Leader’s Crest.
bisharp->kingambit.reason: Add a useful special-method note for a non-standard evolution.

bramblin->brambleghast.note: Level up after walking 1,000 steps with Bramblin using Let’s Go.
bramblin->brambleghast.reason: Add a useful special-method note for a non-standard evolution.

gimmighoul->gholdengo.note: Level up while the player has 999 Gimmighoul Coins.
gimmighoul->gholdengo.reason: Add a useful special-method note for a non-standard evolution.

pawmo->pawmot.note: Level up after walking 1,000 steps with Pawmo using Let’s Go.
pawmo->pawmot.reason: Add a useful special-method note for a non-standard evolution.

primeape->annihilape.note: Level up after Primeape uses Rage Fist 20 times.
primeape->annihilape.reason: Add a useful special-method note for a non-standard evolution.

rellor->rabsca.note: Level up after walking 1,000 steps with Rellor using Let’s Go.
rellor->rabsca.reason: Add a useful special-method note for a non-standard evolution.

milcery->alcremie.note: Give Milcery a Sweet, then spin with the player character. Form depends on spin direction/time and held Sweet.
milcery->alcremie.reason: Add a useful special-method note for a non-standard evolution.

farfetchd->sirfetchd.note: Land three critical hits in one battle.
farfetchd->sirfetchd.reason: Normalize the trigger and show a clear note.

qwilfish->overqwil.note: Use Barb Barrage in Strong Style 20 times, then level up.
qwilfish->overqwil.reason: Add a useful special-method note for a non-standard evolution.

stantler->wyrdeer.note: Use Psyshield Bash in Agile Style 20 times, then level up.
stantler->wyrdeer.reason: Add a useful special-method note for a non-standard evolution.

yamask->runerigus.note: Galarian Yamask evolves after taking 49+ damage without fainting, then traveling under the large stone arch in Dusty Bowl.
yamask->runerigus.reason: Add a useful special-method note for a non-standard evolution.

yamask-galar->runerigus.note: Take 49+ damage without fainting, then travel under the large stone arch in Dusty Bowl.
yamask-galar->runerigus.reason: Normalize wording for a game-specific special evolution.

policy.primary_display: Prefer the most generally useful method for a current player. Use modern/common item methods when they exist.
policy.preserve_history: Older or game-specific methods are preserved in the note field instead of shown as the primary method.
policy.do_not_guess: Region-only or special mechanic evolutions without a common replacement are reported for review rather than rewritten automatically.
